<?php namespace Faker\Provider\ru_RU; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { protected static $freeEmailDomain = ['yandex.ru', 'ya.ru', 'narod.ru', 'gmail.com', 'mail.ru', 'list.ru', 'bk.ru', 'inbox.ru', 'rambler.ru', 'hotmail.com']; protected static $tld = ['com', 'com', 'net', 'org', 'ru', 'ru', 'ru', 'ru']; }
